The Cr-targets were prepared by electro deposition on
23.75 um thick, high purity Cu backing. Cr layers
between 17.8 and 24.3 um thick were obtained.
grouped per six in five short stacks. In three stacks

Cr/Cu, respectively Cu/Cr target. This configuration,
together with the different Cr layer thicknesses,
allowed to obtain five different median energies in
the first Cr layer with the same setting of the
accelerator, ensuring the same 39 MeV incident
a-particle energy. Irradiations lasted for 50 min.
